changeSet.author: sumicare
changeSet.sql: UPDATE treatment_slips ts SET attendee_id = oia.id FROM order_item_attendees oia WHERE ts.attendee_id IS NULL AND ts.session_id IS NOT NULL AND oia.session_id = ts.session_id;

changeSet.author: sumicare
changeSet.sql: UPDATE treatment_slips ts SET locker_number = oia.locker_number FROM order_item_attendees oia WHERE ts.attendee_id = oia.id AND oia.locker_number IS NOT NULL AND oia.locker_number <> '';
